name: Split PDF
description: Split a single PDF into multiple parts. Supports page ranges, per-page splitting, and fixed chunk splitting.

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Page ranges: '1-3,5,8-10'. Each comma group = one output PDF.

fields.name: mode
fields.description: Split mode. 'each' = one PDF per page.

fields.name: chunks
fields.description: Split into N roughly equal parts

fields.name: output
fields.description: Output mode. Output is always a zip.
